pi_items.source: Analysis of setup_task.sh and Natural Earth zip structure
Analysis of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which expect this exact path
Geospatial intersection test using downloaded Natural Earth 110m country and river shapefiles confirmed these countries do not intersect the 13 major river lines.
Geospatial intersection test using downloaded Natural Earth 110m country and river shapefiles confirmed these countries do intersect the major river lines.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Natural Earth 110m data for countries and rivers. A spatial join analysis confirms that 142 out of 177 countries do not intersect any of the 13 major river features in the rivers dataset. The expected 'arid' countries (Saudi Arabia, Libya, Yemen, Oman) correctly do not intersect these rivers, while the excluded countries (Brazil, United States of America, China, Dem. Rep. Congo) correctly do intersect them. The target output shapefile must be saved at /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/arid_countries.shp.
